name: Rescue Survivor
description: A wounded adventurer is trapped behind collapsed stone.

choices.label: Risk time and resources to rescue them
choices.message: The guild risks danger to save a stranger.

choices.label: Leave them behind and keep moving
choices.message: The party leaves the survivor behind.

name: Cursed Shrine
description: A shrine pulses with unstable power.

choices.label: Purify the shrine
choices.message: The shrine is purified and releases restorative light.

choices.label: Take its power
choices.message: The party draws dangerous power from the shrine.

name: Hidden Armory
description: A sealed armory lies behind an old mechanism.

choices.label: Search carefully
choices.message: The party takes its time and searches carefully.

choices.label: Force it open quickly
choices.message: The party forces the armory open, triggering old defenses.

name: Rival Party
description: A rival adventuring party is weakened but carrying supplies.

choices.label: Help them regroup
choices.message: The guild earns respect by aiding rivals.

choices.label: Rob them for supplies
choices.message: The guild takes supplies by force.

name: Spirit Bargain
description: A spirit offers knowledge in exchange for pain.

choices.label: Accept the bargain
choices.message: The party accepts painful forbidden knowledge.

choices.label: Refuse and move on
choices.message: The party refuses the spirit's bargain.
